command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 44TTARZqZm4zxSK.b3f2309fec40 --database VPbZo3VRZUT62wWDPHVeqm --execute 
SELECT id, orderNumber, tenantId, status FROM receivingOrders WHERE id = 1170003;

SELECT roi.id, roi.receivingOrderId, roi.productId, p.sku, ptm.externalCode, roi.receivedQuantity, roi.expectedQuantity
FROM receivingOrderItems roi
JOIN products p ON p.id = roi.productId
LEFT JOIN productTenantMappings ptm ON ptm.productId = roi.productId
WHERE roi.receivingOrderId = 1170003;
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 4: Unknown column 'ptm.externalcode' in 'field list'
